title: Point Blank - Call of Duty: Modern Warfare
description: Point Blank addon that adds weapons from CoD: MW
body:
## Requires Point Blank: Jelly
This is a fan made expansion for Point Blank that adds weapons from Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare.



The main goal during the creation of the extension was to adhere as much as possible to the original VPB artstyle.

Current Version of the addon adds:
- M4A1 SOPMOD
- M14
- M21
- M21 Ghillie
- Reflex Sight
- Red Dot Sight
